_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of target intelligence gathering and operational preparation techniques and life cycles.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time serving, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, and shadow deployments, and the infrastructure requirements and failure modes of each.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-023 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-006 (DG, cosine: 0.493), DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.493).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.369). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [cycles, gathering, intelligence, life, operational, preparation] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.896, R=0.842). P exceeds R by 0.055 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (95.4%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of target intelligence gathering and operational preparation technique" and "Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time s". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.496 > STS 0.369 (gap +0.127). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [cycles, gathering, intelligence, life, operational, preparation]. WIDAI-only: [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge].
